textPlain: If children were to spend time in digital spaces they should be disconnected from adults (especially the adults who try to prime, turning them into next generation of consumers).I think offline spaces should be just fine.

I've seen people come up with some pretty cool AI generated statistics for a lot of interesting things. Recently saw an AI generated food 3d printer and cooker. AI generated door dash food items. Even some AI generated star trek fan fiction. All far superior to this garbage. Give me my 35 seconds back jerk.
